# 🪶 Bird Tarot

> *Where ancient archetypes meet the natural world.*

Welcome to the repository for **[birdtarot.com](https://birdtarot.com)**! This project contains the static site code for our avian-inspired tarot deck. 

We built this space because we believe the traditional wisdom of the tarot maps beautifully onto the diverse, wild, and fascinating world of birds. The goal of this site is to provide a calm, grounded, and easily accessible digital space for daily readings and reflections.

---
